title: Hand Wire Brush Set 4 Pcs with Stainless Steel Brush and Brass Brush,Wire Brush for Cleaning Rust, Paint and Welding Slag (2 Big,2 Small)
features: [4pcs tool] 1*240 mm stainless steel brush with plastic handle, 1*240 mm brass brush with plastic handle, 1*180 mm stainless steel brush with rubber handle,1*180 mm brass brush with rubber handle.

[Great Wire bristles] Includes two different types (stainless steel and brass brush) for different cleaning needs.The brass brush hardness is moderate, can quickly remove stubborn stains. Stainless steel wire brush high hardness, steel wire more dense durable, strong cleaning power.

[Multifunctional] Strong cleaning, labor saving and high efficiency. Ideal for cleaning, removal, deburring , structuring, rust removal, grinding and processing of metal, non-ferrous metal, steel, alloys, wood, wood materials, stainless steel and brass.
[Easy to Hold] Curved handle design, comfortable grip reduces hand fatigue, easy to control. Each wire brush handle has a hole at the end specially designed for users to hang and store.

[High quality product] Provided 0.3 wire diameter brush head , bristles tight, not easy to shed.This set of multifunctional tools suitable for different surface types, they will address all your cleaning concerns.
description: Product Description Slim curved spine The slim curved spine makes it easier to get into hard-to-clean areas. Sturdy steel wire High-tensile steel ensures durability, supporting heavy use without bending or breaking. Easy-grip handle Textured, non-slip surface enhances control and minimizes fatigue during extended use. Storage eyelet Convenient hanging hole for compact storage, keeping the tool accessible and organized. About Us MIVITOOM is committed to providing high quality wire brushes. Made of stainless steel and brass, the brushes are durable and resistant to rust. Wire brushes are perfect for outdoor cleaning and require only a small amount of detergent and water to make your items look new. 2 Small Brushes with Rubber Grips Brass Brush Effectively cleans tough burnt stains on hobs without scratching, thanks to soft brass bristles that protect surfaces while removing grime. Gently eliminates rust and deposits from delicate metals like copper and brass while maintaining their original polished finish. Stainless Steel Brush Heavy-duty stainless bristles aggressively remove rust, paint, and weld without bending, ideal for workshop use. Prevents corrosion and ensures surfaces remain clean and smooth. Suitable for removing rust, sanding, deburring, working cleanly and improving efficiency. MIVITOOM Hand Wire Brush Set 4 Pcs with Stainless Steel Brush and Brass Brush...
